criteria.label: Name three 'pay memory to save time' and three 'pay time to save memory' moves on demand.
criteria.example: Pay memory: hash table, lru_cache, prefix sums. Pay time: streaming, rolling DP rows, recompute on demand.

criteria.label: Identify the scarce resource in a system before choosing a tradeoff.
criteria.example: Mobile inference: scarce = memory + battery. Server-side RAG: scarce = latency. Eval pipeline: scarce = throughput.

criteria.label: Bound and instrument every cache (size cap, TTL, hit-rate metric).
Compress DP / table memory when the recurrence permits, without touching time complexity.
criteria.example: Edit distance: keep two rolling rows → O(n) memory.

criteria.label: Articulate the Gen AI tradeoffs (KV-cache, vector index, quantization, prompt caching) and which axis each one buys.
criteria.example: KV-cache: O(n · layers · d) memory bought a drop from O(n²) to O(n) per-token attention work.

criteria.label: Profile first; choose the move that buys the *measured* scarce resource.
criteria.example: `cProfile.run('endpoint()')` → 70% of time in `encode()` → cache encoded prompts (memory ↑, latency ↓).
